item.title: Version 0.0.39
item.description: - Changed the shipped defaults so `Show menu bar icon` starts enabled, `Show settings on startup` stays off after the first run, and `Start Docktor Beta at login` remains off by default. - Removed the development-only preference overrides that forced the menu bar icon and startup settings window on, so local builds now match the shipped app behavior. - Added a settings-shell regression that verifies first launch opens settings once and subsequent launches stay closed when `showOnStartup` is disabled.
